title: Invy
description: Invy lets staff view and edit player inventories and ender chests seamlessly, whether players are online or offline, with safe automatic syncing.
body:
# Invy

View and edit **player inventories and ender chests**, whether the player is **online or offline**.

Built for moderation and recovery. Safe by default.

---

## What this plugin does

- Open a player’s **inventory** (online or offline)
- Open a player’s **ender chest** (online or offline)
- Move, add, or remove items normally
- Changes are saved automatically
- If an offline player joins while being viewed, the inventory closes immediately to prevent desync

Online players are always handled live.

---

## Commands

```

/invy inventory/inv <player/uuid>

```
Opens the player’s inventory.  
Works for both online and offline players.

```

/invy enderchest/ec <player/uuid>

```
Opens the player’s ender chest.  
Works for both online and offline players.

---
